DateETFTypeUnits PriceValueP&LFriction
FY-wise tax breakdown (Apr–Mar)
Tax rules
• STCG 20% on equity ETF gains held ≤ 365 days
• LTCG 12.5% on gains held > 365 days (above Rs1L exemption per year)
• Losses in a FY offset gains before tax is applied
• Net loss years carry forward to offset next FY gains
• Tax settled as lump sum at start of April each year
• Skim profits: only realised gain taxed (cost basis returned to position)
Strategy parameters
Supabase sync (cross-device)
Data
